final:
// // Asynchronous reset synchronously sets output to 1
module d_flip_flop (
	input clk,
	input reset,
	input d,
	output reg q);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
	if (reset) begin
		q <= 1'b0;
	end else begin
		q <= d;
	end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // Asynchronous reset synchronously sets output to 1
